description: Rule-based anomaly detection over DAC official enode observation history.
coverage_note: Manual backfill is a partial archive. Missing dates represent missed observation windows, not confirmed absence of changes.

latest_observation.severity_reason: Small enode rotation detected: 0 added and 1 removed.

rules.description: Current enode count drops to 30% or less of previous total.
Current enode count decreases by at least 5.
At least 5 enodes removed or at least 50% of previous enodes removed.
Added plus removed enode count is at least 8.
Added plus removed enode count is at least 6.
Less than 40% of previous enodes remained unchanged.
Automated watcher classified the observation as HIGH or CRITICAL.

report_summary.short_summary: 5 anomaly signals were detected across 51 observations. The highest observed anomaly severity is HIGH.
report_summary.technical_interpretation: The anomaly layer highlights observations that may indicate unusually large peer rotation, sharp enode count changes, low continuity, or unexpected target port behavior.
report_summary.recommended_action: Use these anomaly events as candidates for deeper manual review and future technical reporting.

anomalies.reason: Official enode count decreased by 6 from 13 to 7.
anomalies.technical_impact: A large decrease may indicate a significant peer-list refresh or infrastructure rotation.
anomalies.recommended_action: Compare removed enodes and check whether the next observation restores the count.

anomalies.reason: 7 enodes were removed from a previous total of 13.
anomalies.technical_impact: High removal count may indicate bootstrap peer replacement or infrastructure rotation.
anomalies.recommended_action: Review removed enodes and preserve the snapshot for future report comparison.

anomalies.reason: Large rotation intensity detected: 1 added and 7 removed.
anomalies.technical_impact: High rotation intensity may suggest infrastructure maintenance, peer refresh, or node replacement.
anomalies.recommended_action: Track whether the next observations stabilize or continue rotating heavily.

anomalies.reason: Large rotation intensity detected: 4 added and 4 removed.
anomalies.technical_impact: High rotation intensity may suggest infrastructure maintenance, peer refresh, or node replacement.
anomalies.recommended_action: Track whether the next observations stabilize or continue rotating heavily.

anomalies.reason: Large rotation intensity detected: 5 added and 3 removed.
anomalies.technical_impact: High rotation intensity may suggest infrastructure maintenance, peer refresh, or node replacement.
anomalies.recommended_action: Track whether the next observations stabilize or continue rotating heavily.
